sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52347" key="kakosto/matos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-στόμᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52347.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">foulmouthed</tr_>, sens. obsc., <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fellator,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.155</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
